question: Which region is the city Kabul located in?
gold_sql: SELECT Region FROM country AS T1 JOIN city AS T2 ON T1.Code  =  T2.CountryCode WHERE T2.Name  =  "Kabul"
predicted_sql: SELECT T2.text_3 FROM table_1 AS T1 JOIN table_3 AS T2 ON T1.fk_1 = T2.pk_1 WHERE T1.text_1 = 'Kabul'
raw_response: SELECT T2.text_3 FROM table_1 AS T1 JOIN table_3 AS T2 ON T1.fk_1 = T2.pk_1 WHERE T1.text_1 = 'Kabul'
